1.title: Navigate to Rules and Actions Screen

content.text: System shall display the Rules and actions screen when user selects -> Rack -> IRDS -> Rules and actions.
the Rules and Actions screen to open when I navigate through Rack → IRDS → Rules and Actions
I navigate through Rack → IRDS → Rules and Actions,
the Rules and Actions screen is displayed.
System shall display breadcrumb navigation: Rack > Integrated Rack Diagnostic Suite > Rules and Action.
I am on the Rules and Actions screen,
the breadcrumb displays “Rack > Integrated Rack Diagnostic Suite > Rules and Action”.
System shall display page title as “Rules and Action”.
I know which module I am using.
the Rules and Actions page is displayed,
the title “Rules and Action” is visible.
System shall provide two tabs: Inspection and Testing.
two tabs labeled Inspection and Testing
I can switch between rule categories.
the Rules and Actions page is displayed,
Inspection and Testing tabs are visible.
System shall highlight the selected tab.
I know which tab is active.
the selected tab is visually highlighted.

6.title: View Test List in Testing Tab

content.text: When user selects Testing tab, system shall display the list of Test names.
see a list of tests when I select the Testing tab
I can review available testing rules.
the system displays the list of test names.
System shall provide a search field labelled “Search tests…”.
I can find specific tests quickly.
a search field labeled “Search tests…” is displayed.
System shall filter test records dynamically based on entered search keyword (Test ID or Test Name).
test records filtered dynamically based on search input
I can quickly locate specific tests.
the search field contains a keyword,
I enter text matching Test ID or Test Name,
the table dynamically filters the test records.
System shall display test records in tabular format.
test records displayed in tabular format
I can review test details efficiently.
the records appear in a table layout.
System shall display the following columns: Test ID, Test Name, Test Scope, Linked Element Types, Status, and Action menu.
the table to display all relevant columns
I can understand test configuration details.
the columns Test ID, Test Name, Test Scope, Linked Element Types, Status, and Action menu are visible.
System shall allow sorting on Test ID column, Test Name column and Test Scope column.
sort the table by Test ID, Test Name, and Test Scope
I click the column header for Test ID, Test Name, or Test Scope,
the table records are sorted accordingly.

12.title: Display Test Scope with Visual Differentiation

content.text: System shall display Test Scope as either “Global” or “Local” with visual differentiation.
the Test Scope displayed with visual differentiation
I can quickly identify Global or Local scope.
the Test Scope column is rendered,
the scope appears as either “Global” or “Local” with visual styling.

13.title: Display Linked Element Types as Tags

content.text: System shall display linked element types as tags (e.g., Beam, Upright, Bracing, Baseplate, Floor).
linked element types displayed as tags
I can easily identify related rack elements.
element types appear as tags (e.g., Beam, Upright, Bracing, Baseplate, Floor).

14.title: Display Placeholder When No Linked Elements

content.text: System shall display “—” if no linked element types are available.
a placeholder displayed when no linked elements exist
I understand that no elements are associated.
a test rule has no linked element types,
System shall display status toggle for each test name.
a status toggle for each test name
I can enable or disable tests.
a toggle control is available for that test name.

16.title: Display Active Status When Toggle is ON

content.text: When toggle is ON, system shall display status as “Active”.
the test rule to show “Active” when the toggle is ON
I know the rule is enabled.
a test rule toggle is switched ON,
the system shows the status as “Active”.
When user switches toggle OFF, system shall deactivate the test rule.
deactivate a test rule using the toggle
the system deactivates the test rule.
System shall persist status changes after toggle action.
I change the toggle status of a test rule,
the system persists the updated status.
System shall support pagination for test records.
large lists are easier to navigate.
System shall display current page indicator (e.g., Page 1 of 2).
I know my position in the list.
the system shows the current page indicator (e.g., Page 1 of 2).

21.title: Navigate Using Previous and Next Controls

content.text: System shall provide Previous and Next navigation controls for pagination.
the system navigates to the respective page.
System shall allow user to select number of rows per page (e.g., 10).
choose how many rows appear per page
I select a row count option (e.g., 10),
the table updates to display the selected number of rows.
System shall dynamically update record count based on selected rows per page.
the record count to update when rows per page changes
I know how many records are displayed.
I change the rows per page setting,
the displayed record count updates dynamically.

24.title: Load Additional Records on Page Navigation

content.text: System shall load additional test records when navigating to next page.
additional test records loaded when navigating pages
I can view the full dataset.
I navigate to the next page,
the system displays the next set of test records.

25.title: Maintain Search and Sort During Pagination

content.text: System shall maintain applied search and sort criteria during pagination.
search and sort criteria preserved while paging
the system maintains the applied search and sorting criteria.

26.title: Visually Differentiate Global and Local Tests

content.text: System shall visually differentiate Global tests (e.g., G1–G5) from Local tests (e.g., L1–L10).
Global and Local tests visually distinguished
I can easily identify their type.
Global tests (e.g., G1–G5) and Local tests (e.g., L1–L10) appear visually differentiated.

27.title: Restrict Linked Elements for Global Tests

content.text: System shall ensure that Global tests cannot require linked element types.
Global tests to not require linked element types
a test rule has Global scope,
linked element types are not required.

28.title: Allow Element Linking for Local Tests

content.text: System shall allow Local tests to be associated with one or more element types.
Local tests to support linking with element types
rules can target specific rack components.
a test rule has Local scope,
the system allows association with one or more element types.
System shall refresh test list when switching between Inspection and Testing tabs.
the test list refreshed when switching between Inspection and Testing tabs
I always see the correct data.
I switch between Inspection and Testing tabs,
the system refreshes and loads the relevant records.
